---
title: "Teaching"
subtitle: "Courses taught by group members"
---

::: {.snuc-cards}
<div class="snuc-card">
### Statistical Network Analysis
**SOL3111**

<!-- TODO: add level (undergraduate/graduate), term offered, and a short description. -->
</div>

<div class="snuc-card">
### Social Networks
**SOL160**

<!-- TODO: add level (undergraduate/graduate), term offered, and a short description. -->
</div>
:::
